summary: Classified the ten open PRs in this live inventory shard independently. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive hydrated item was detected, instant close and low-signal closeout are disabled, and merge/fix/raise_pr actions are blocked by the job. All PRs should remain open; #91477 also needs maintainer/product direction before it can leave draft status.
